account.title: My Account

account.protect2FA: Protect your account with 2FA. An additional code will be required for sensitive operations.

emailModal.title: Update Email
emailModal.twoFACodeHint: This code is required to securely change your email address.
emailModal.importantText: A confirmation email will be sent to the new address. You must verify it to complete the change.
emailModal.importantText2FA: Your 2FA code is also required to validate this secure operation.
emailModal.errorSameEmail: The new email must be different from the current one
emailModal.errorInvalidEmail: The email format is not valid
emailModal.error2FARequired: A 2FA code is required to change your email
emailModal.error2FALength: The 2FA code must be at least 6 characters
emailModal.errorGeneric: Error updating email. Please try again.
emailModal.successMessage: A confirmation email has been sent to {{email}}. Please verify your new email.

twoFAModal.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFAModal.securityText: Two-factor authentication is essential to protect your account and funds.
twoFAModal.recoveryCodesHint: Save these codes in a safe place. You can use them if you lose access to your authenticator.
twoFAModal.enabledText: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication using {{method}}.
twoFAModal.enabledMessage: 2FA has been enabled. Save your recovery codes in a safe place.
